description_long: This object consists of a group of nine hardcover books arranged in two upright clusters with three books stacked horizontally in the center. The books feature a variety of muted cover colors, including brown, green, blue, gray, and red, with some covers showing subtle texture and wear. The spines are mostly plain, with a few featuring simple horizontal bands or embossed details, and one book has a visible label on its front cover. The books vary slightly in thickness and height, giving the arrangement a casual, lived-in appearance. The edges of the pages are visible on several books, showing a light cream color. The overall look is that of a small, curated collection of classic or reference books, suitable for a home, office, or public urban setting.
description: A group of nine hardcover books in muted colors, arranged upright and stacked, with visible textured covers and simple spines.
description_view_0: Front view showing all nine books, with three stacked horizontally in the center and upright books on either side.
description_view_1: Side view showing the spines and covers of the upright books, with the stacked books mostly hidden behind.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, but with the back covers of the books visible and no label on the central book.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the plain covers of the upright books, with the stacked books mostly obscured.
attribute_spine_design: The spines are mostly plain with solid colors such as brown, green, blue, and gray, some featuring horizontal bands or subtle embossed details. No visible text or decorative elements are present on the spines.
